description: Returns the list of workflow build versions for a specified workflow version ARN.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow build version.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow build version.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[^:]*:imagebuilder:[^:]+:(?:[0-9]{12}|aws(?:-[a-z-]+)?):workflow/(build|test|distribution)/[a-z0-9-_]+/[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+/[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the workflow.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[-_A-Za-z-0-9][-_A-Za-z0-9 ]{1,126}[-_A-Za-z-0-9]$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Version.description: The semantic version of the workflow (major.minor.patch).
Version.markdownDescription:
The semantic version of the workflow (major.minor.patch).

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

BuildNumber.markdownDescription:
The build number of the workflow build version.

---

Required: No  
Type: String

Read only property: Yes
